source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Figure shows a pulse train. What is the maximum pulse-transmission rate (pulses per second) through an electronics system with a \( 200 \text{ kHz} \) bandwidth? (This is the bandwidth allotted to each FM radio station.)

image_dependency: question_text explicitly says 'Figure shows a pulse train,' indicating the visual is part of the problem statement
asset_registry_record shows an image exists and registry_passed=true
multi_step: solving likely requires combining the visual pulse-train context with the stated 200 kHz bandwidth
the task is not pure lookup; it requires relating bandwidth to a maximum pulse rate and then selecting/reporting a numeric result
multiple-choice options suggest a quantitative reasoning step rather than simple image recognition
verifiability: answer_type is short_text with a precise numeric value
the same value appears among the multiple-choice options, making answer matching straightforward
the expected output is a single scalar rate in pulses/s, which is easy to check

decision_reasons: question, answer, and required image are all present, so the core semantic assets are complete
asset registry passed with no reported issues
high image dependency is acceptable here because the image file exists and is available
